meta.phase-name: Content Schema File + Test Mode Loop

phase-plan.purpose: Reframe schema authoring as Content Schema Files and add a rapid test loop that builds a bundle and immediately runs a playthrough for visualization feedback.
phase-plan.scope: Space Explorer only in this slice. Keep current engine contracts; no server-side runner migration in 51-01. Supabase/S3 sync is planning scope for 51-03.

file.description: Rename schema UX to Content Schema File, improve JSON schema structure for model inheritance + stats object, and add quick test mode build+playthrough controls.
Existing bundle builder route consumed by test mode quick loop.
Browser playthrough runner reused for quick test-mode feedback loop.

task.description: Rename model schema language in UI to Content Schema File and update info panel labels.
Update JSON schema output to express inheritance layers and stats object structure.
Add one-click test mode flow: build bundle + run browser playthrough + bind report to generated pack identity.
Document next slice for Supabase/S3 pull/push contracts (bundles + reports).

decision.summary: Schema artifacts are presented as Content Schema Files to align authoring intent around content relationships, inheritance, and stat variable structures.
decision.impact: Reduces model-viewer ambiguity and aligns future codegen/output naming.

decision.summary: 51-01 uses browser runner for quick feedback and pack binding; dedicated server/agent execution can be added as a follow-up route.
decision.impact: Unblocks fast authoring loops now while preserving a path for engine-mcp-backed execution later.
